case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANA BERTHA COBOS-ALVARADO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUING HEARING TO DECEMBER 29, 2017 AT 8:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
